messages.text:
## Flows

| ID | Name | Description | Steps |
|---|---|---|---|

Use `/flow <id>` to run a flow.
_(no project memories stored yet; use `/memory --global` to include global memory)_

## @raptor slash commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/help` | Show this reference |
| `/memory` | Show persistent memory |
| `/resume` | Load last session summary and continue |
| `/todos` | Show current todo list |
| `/clearmemory` | Wipe all persistent memory |
| `/steer <msg>` | Inject guidance into running agent (picked up next iteration) |
| `/agents` | List loaded agents |
| `/agent <id>` | Switch to a specific agent |
| `/flows` | List loaded flows |
| `/flow <id>` | Run a specific flow |
| `/models` | List providers, capability, and available models |
| `/build-flow` | Design and build an agent flow for this project |

## Tools

| Tool | What it does |
|---|---|
| `readFile` | Read file (optional line range) |
| `writeFile` | Create or overwrite a file |
| `editFile` | Surgical old->new string replacement |
| `multiEdit` | Batch edits across multiple files |
| `listDir` | List directory contents |
| `glob` | Find files by glob pattern |
| `searchCode` | Grep -- string/regex search across files |
| `runTerminal` | Run shell commands, capture output |
| `webFetch` | Fetch a URL |
| `getDiagnostics` | VS Code errors/warnings |
| `todoWrite` | Persist todo list |
| `memoryRead` | Read persistent memory |
| `memoryWrite` | Write/update memory entry |
| `lsp` | Go-to-definition, references, hover, symbols |
| `spawnAgent` | Spawn a sub-agent with a scoped task |

## Flows

| ID | Name | Description | Steps |
|---|---|---|---|

Use `/flow <id>` to run a flow.

[COMMAND: /build-flow]
Follow the agent-flow-builder skill process now.
Start with Phase 1: read .raptor/agents.json and .raptor/flows.json using readFile; treat missing files as empty arrays.
Then continue to Phase 2 and interview the user in one message.
Let  me  read  the  current  config  files .
